testcase.name: verify_account_signin
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [Home] but found [Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (4d87c6cda58f1f14eb60403044cdf363)] -> xpath: //a[@href='#logixerp_home_dashboard']] (tried for 20 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.37.0', revision: '3c1da1e342' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '22.0.2' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 141.0.7390.108, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 141.0.7390.122 (b477534e7e1..., userDataDir: C:\Users\My\AppData\Local\T...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:52747}, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:52747/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 141.0.7390.108, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 4d87c6cda58f1f14eb60403044cdf363] at testCases.TC002_SigninTest.verify_account_signin(TC002_SigninTest.java:34) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1597) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:317) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1570) ...
